note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Ale of The God-King no longer empties your Tankard.
Increases the amount of attacks that can trigger your Ale of The God-King by 10.
Reduces the Energy cost of your Ancestral Combat by -30 and allows it to trigger 10 additional times.
Your Unbridled Rage now increases your chance to trigger Ancestral Combat by 25%.
Attacks from your Ancestral Combat now heal your Honored Ancestor for 5% maximum health and cause it to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack.

Ancestral Fury.baseDescription:
Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description:
Casting Ancestral Roar now increases haste of party and raid members by 5% for 20 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Critical strikes extend the duration of the buff by 1 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of your Warband by -30 sec and Ancestral Roar by -5 sec.
Increases the damage of Ancestral Strike and Barbaric Whirl by 20%.

Level 20 Passive
Critical strikes with Ancestral Strike and Brutal Swing now refund 10 Energy.
Damage dealt by Ancestral Strike and Crush now scales with your Strength.
Melee attacks now have an 8% chance to heal you for 10% of the damage dealt and cause your next Ancestral Strike to deal 50% increased damage.

While below 35% health, your auto attacks, Ancestral Strike, and Throw Weapon now grant Born in Blood. Can only occur once every 2 sec.
Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.
Casting Keg Smash now causes your Honored Ancestor to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack upon nearby enemies.
Attacks from your Ancestral Combat now heal your Honored Ancestor for 5% maximum health and cause it to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack.

Ancestral Wisdom.baseDescription:
Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1% for you and party and raid members.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Axe Twirling by -15 sec.
Increases the duration of Axe Twirling, Maiming Spear, and Barbed Spear by 5 sec.

Teaches you Ancestor's Call.Ancestor's Call (Troll)Call an Honored Ancestor to aid you in battle until dismissed that scales with your Agility and attack power.

Whenever you use Barbaric Whirl or Whirling Advance, your Honored Ancestor mimics it.
Increases the damage of Ancestral Strike and Barbaric Whirl by 20%.
Reduces the cooldown of Barbaric Whirl by -2 sec and increases its damage dealt by 100% on enemies below 35% health.

Barbed Spear.baseDescription: Throw a heavy spear with precision at an enemy, dealing 160% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 37, and reducing their healing received by -30% for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Critical strikes with Barbed Spear now grants Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.
Increases the duration of Axe Twirling, Maiming Spear, and Barbed Spear by 5 sec.

Battering Ram.baseDescription: Increases your Armor penetration by 20% while wielding a two-handed mace or axe.

Battle Rhythm.baseDescription: Critical strikes with abilities now generate 5 Energy.

modifyingTalents.description: Your ability critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of your Battle Vigor and Thick Skull by -1 sec.
While enraged, casting Spears now refreshes 3 charges of Berserker Axe and your next 3 casts cost -50% less Energy. Lasts 12 seconds.
Display mastery over throwing weapons for 10 seconds, causing Throw Weapon, Gutspiller, and Berserker Axe to strike 2 additional nearby enemies.
Increases the critical strike chance of Spears and Berserker Axe by 15% against bleeding targets.
Quickly unleash 3 Berserker Throws at your target and then fling yourself back a great distance, dealing 125% Ranged Weapon Damage, scaling with modifiers to Berserker Axe.

Berserker Rush.baseDescription: Charge an enemy dealing 31 + 35% ranged AP Physical damage and rooting them for 2 seconds, then leap backwards.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Berserker Rush now grants you Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

While enraged, your ranged critical strikes now grant you Berserker. Once applied it cannot be applied again.BerserkerYour ranged abilities have a 20% chance to unleash Berserker Throw, dealing 75% Ranged Weapon Damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

While active, every offensive ranged ability used increases its chance to trigger by 2%.
Quickly unleash 3 Berserker Throws at your target and then fling yourself back a great distance, dealing 125% Ranged Weapon Damage, scaling with modifiers to Berserker Axe.

Blood and Glory.baseDescription: While at or below 35% maximum health, you now gain 20% increased healing received and take -10% reduced damage.

Body Builder.baseDescription:
Level 50 Passive
You now gain 1 Strength for every 3 Agility and your size is increased by 5%.

Born Killer.baseDescription: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor now grants you 5% increased armor penetration and movement speed for 5 seconds, stacking 20 times.

modifyingTalents.description:
Charge at an enemy, dealing 25 + 30% AP Physical damage.

Can only be used within 6 seconds of scoring a killing blow or applying Born in Blood.
Increases the duration of Born in Blood by 2 sec.
Casting Unbridled Rage now grants you Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.
Bring all nearby allies into the warband for 12 seconds, granting them Born in Blood, repeating every 3 sec.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

While below 35% health, your auto attacks, Ancestral Strike, and Throw Weapon now grant Born in Blood. Can only occur once every 2 sec.
Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Your thick skull makes you immune to all stun effects for 10 seconds and while active taking direct damage grants you Born in Blood.

Usable while stunned.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Level 20 Passive
Born in Blood now also increases your damage dealt by 5% and its duration is increased by 3 sec.
Critical strikes with Barbed Spear now grants Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.
Casting Berserker Rush now grants you Born in Blood.Born in BloodBattle fuels your vitality, restoring 18 health and 12 Energy over 3 seconds.

Level 40 Passive
Born in Blood now stacks 1 additional time.
Increases the tick rate of Born in Blood by -25%, allows its healing to scale with your Agility, and it can now critically heal you.

Casting Throw Weapon now has a 25% chance to transform your next cast of it within 8 seconds into Rapid Throw.Rapid ThrowThrow your ranged weapon 3 times in quick succession, each dealing 50% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 Physical damage. 

Grants Born in Blood. Scales with damage modifiers to Throw Weapon.
Reduces the Energy cost of Break by -15.

Increases the critical strike chance of Guts Spilled by 10% and it now applies Break to the target and critically striking with it will apply an additional stack.BreakBreak an enemy's defenses, reducing their armor by -4% for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Breath of The North now causes the target to bleed for an additional 30% of its damage over 6 seconds as Frost damage.
Casting Breath of the North now grants you 10% melee attack speed, plus an additional 20% when using a two-handed weapon, for 8 seconds.

Increases the critical strike chance of Breath of the North by 10%.

In addition, your attacks now ignore Armor against Frozen targets.
Damage dealt by Breath of the North now reduces enemies' resistances by 75 and increases their Magic damage taken by -2% for 8 seconds.

Brutal Swing.baseDescription: Your next attack causes you to swing violently at an enemy and up to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 120% Weapon Damage plus 10.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 20 Passive
Critical strikes with Ancestral Strike and Brutal Swing now refund 10 Energy.
Increases the critical strike chance of Brutal Swing and Smash by 10%.
Increases the critical damage of Crush, Brutal Swing, and Decapitate by 20%.
Your Brutal Swing now triggers an additional auto attack on the primary target.
Scoring a critical strike against an enemy now reduces the cooldown of Carnage by -4 sec.

Cheers!.baseDescription:
Designate an ally as your drinking partner for 30 minutes, reducing all damage they take by -5%, and causing 10% of all damage they take to be redirected to you.

You can only have 1 ally designated at a time.

Crush.baseDescription: Crush enemies in a frontal cone, dealing 250% Weapon Damage plus 30, knocking them down briefly and stunning them for 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical damage of Crush, Brutal Swing, and Decapitate by 20%.
Your Crush is now guaranteed to critically strike enemies affected by Headbutt and it now applies Wounded to enemies for 10 seconds.Wounded (Proc)Increases Physical Damage taken by 4% for 10 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Crush by -5 sec.
Reduces the cast time of Crush by -25%.
Damage dealt by Ancestral Strike and Crush now scales with your Strength.
Melee auto attacks now have a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Crush.

Increases the duration of Maximum Carnage by 1 sec and it now grants Utter Devastation for 6 seconds. Utter DevastationInstantly removes all movement impairing effects, increases your movement speed by 25%, and makes you immune to slows.

Can be consumed by Decapitate or Crush to guarantee them to critically strike.

Crystal Enhancements.baseDescription:
You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Decapitate.baseDescription:
Attempt to decapitate an injured enemy, dealing 165% Weapon Damage plus 15, and converting each extra point of Energy to deal additional damage (up to a maximum cost of 100 Energy).

Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

modifyingTalents.description: Scoring a kill blow with Decapitate now refunds 100% of your maximum Energy.
Increases the critical strike chance of Decapitate and Headhunter's Spear by 30% against targets below 20% health.
Your critical strikes with Decapitate now cause the enemy to bleed, dealing an additional 30% of the damage dealt over 5 seconds.
Increases the critical damage of Crush, Brutal Swing, and Decapitate by 20%.

Increases the duration of Maximum Carnage by 1 sec and it now grants Utter Devastation for 6 seconds. Utter DevastationInstantly removes all movement impairing effects, increases your movement speed by 25%, and makes you immune to slows.

Can be consumed by Decapitate or Crush to guarantee them to critically strike.

Defiance.baseDescription: Attempt to defy death, reducing all damage taken by 30% to 80% based on your current missing health for 15 seconds.

Drunken Brawler.baseDescription: Taking direct damage now increases your chance to dodge by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Efficient Killer.baseDescription: Reduces the Energy cost of your spells and abilities by -10%.

Entrails.baseDescription: Damage dealt by bleed effects now increases your Agility by 1% for 8 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Excessive Power.baseDescription:
Level 10 Passive
Increases your maximum Energy by 100%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Drop the Clanlord's Totem at the target location where it will remain for 15 seconds.

The totem emanates an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players within 100 yds to deal 35% AP additional damage as Frost damage when they deal direct damage and gain 50% increased honor.

Applies Exhaustion, preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

Empower your Honored Ancestor's melee attacks to deal additional Frost damage scaling with your attack power. Lasts for 20 seconds.

This ability consumes Fill Level stacks and triggers a reduced cooldown based on stacks consumed.

Empower yourself, granting your Physical damage dealt a 25% chance to trigger an additional main hand attack as Frost damage on your target and grant a stack of Fill Level.

Lasts until triggered 20 times.

Your melee attacks now have a 15% chance to grant a stack of Fill Level.

In addition, your chance to hit is increased by 5%.
Each Fill Level stack now reduces your damage taken by -2%.
Each Fill Level stack now also increases Frost damage dealt by 4%.

Critical strikes with Frost damage now generate a stack of Fill Level. 

Can only occur once per sec.

First Blood.baseDescription: Increases all damage dealt to enemies above 80% health by 20%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Throw one of your extra tankards at an enemy, dealing 107 Frost damage and stunning them for 4 seconds. 

Stunned enemies are considered Frozen.

Increases the critical strike chance of Breath of the North by 10%.

In addition, your attacks now ignore Armor against Frozen targets.

Critical strikes now grant party and raid members 5% critical strike chance for 8 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description: Enemies damaged by your Frozen Tankard now take 50% increased damage from you for 6 seconds.

Every 6 sec the target has their Guts Spilled, causing them to bleed out for an additional 71 + 40% ranged AP damage.

Headhunter's Spear.baseDescription: Hurl a light spear at an enemy dealing 140% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 21 and restores 30% of your maximum Energy.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Decapitate and Headhunter's Spear by 30% against targets below 20% health.
Your Headhunter's Spear now generates 50% additional Energy when you strike an enemy that is at least 20 yds away.

Hodir's Wrath.baseDescription: Erupt with the power of Hodir, dealing 1361 + 120% AP Frost damage to nearby enemies and restoring 100% of your maximum Energy.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Hodir's Wrath now freezes enemies in place for 0 seconds.

Teaches you Ancestor's Call.Ancestor's Call (Troll)Call an Honored Ancestor to aid you in battle until dismissed that scales with your Agility and attack power.

Attacks from your Ancestral Combat now heal your Honored Ancestor for 5% maximum health and cause it to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack.

Impaling Spear.baseDescription:
Hurl a spear in a 30 yd frontal line, dealing 131% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 23, dealing less damage with each enemy struck.

At the spear's impact location the spear shatters, dealing 277 + 15% ranged AP Physical damage to nearby enemies.

modifyingTalents.description: Whenever you shatter your Impaling Spear, affected enemies bleed for 100% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds.

Iron Gut.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of poison effects on you by -40%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Transforms your Throw Weapon into Javelin Toss and increases the critical strike chance of Javelin Toss by 5%.Javelin TossTake aim and hurl a javelin at an enemy dealing 160% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 241. 

Scales with damage modifiers to Throw Weapon and Spears. Usable while moving.

Jawbreaker.baseDescription: Attempt to break an enemy's jaw, interrupting them and preventing any spell from that school from being cast for 4 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Successfully interrupting a target with Jawbreaker now increases your haste by 30% for 4 seconds and refunds half its Energy cost.

Keg Smash.baseDescription: Smash an enemy for 21 + 15% AP Physical damage, plus an additional 17 + 25% AP Frost damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Keg Smash by 20% and its range by 6 yds.
Damage dealt by Keg Smash now reduces enemies' casting speed by -30% for 15 seconds.
Casting Keg Smash now causes your Honored Ancestor to perform an Ancestral Whirl attack upon nearby enemies.

Maiming Spear.baseDescription: Throw your ranged weapon at your enemy's legs, dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 2 and slowing their movement speed by -50% for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Removes the minimum range from Maiming Spear, but reduces its maximum range by -5 yds.

Level 10 Passive
Reduces the Energy cost of Throw Weapon, Maiming Spear, and Whirling Advance by -15.
Increases the duration of Axe Twirling, Maiming Spear, and Barbed Spear by 5 sec.

Mak'Gora.baseDescription: Critical strikes on enemies above 80% or below 20% health now challenges them to a Mak'Gora. Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your damage dealt by 10% against Humanoids.

Level 40 Passive
Increases your attack power by 30% of your Strength.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Onslaught's effect now occurs -50% faster.
Increases the duration of Onslaught by 6 sec.

Skull Smash.baseDescription:
Pick up a rock and hurl it at an enemy's skull, disorienting them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). 

Damage taken will end this effect.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Skull Smash now removes all bleed effects on the enemy.
Removes the Energy cost from Skull Smash.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Smash by 30% and your expertise by 10.

Storm of Steel.baseDescription: Begin striking your target every 1 sec for 80% Weapon Damage for 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Dealing damage with Storm of Steel increases the damage of its subsequent strikes by 4%, stacking 10 times.

In addition, the duration of Storm of Steel is increased by 2.5 sec.

Level 10 Passive
Grants you Fill Level and the ability to manipulate a Tankard.Fill LevelYou have a magical Tankard that fills up over time, granting you 1 stack of Fill Level every 2 sec.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Tavern Brawl!.baseDescription:
Enrage all nearby allies, increasing their haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

Unrelenting.baseDescription: Increases your Physical damage dealt and taken by 5%.

War Cry.baseDescription:
Unleash a blood curdling war cry, increasing melee and ranged attack speed by 20%, and attack power by 150 of allies within 25 yds for 20 seconds.

Allies cannot benefit from this spell again for 5 minutes.

War Tales.baseDescription: Increases your chance to resist fear and horrify effects by 25%.
